---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What need or pain motivates this? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to happen. Keep it as simple as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches and why they're worse.

## Additional context
Links, mockups, constraints. Large features should get a plan in `docs/plans/`.
